# mihari_status_page (Resource)

Manages a Mihari status page.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mihari_status_page" "public" {
  company_name                = "Example Corp"
  subdomain                   = "status-example"
  password_protection_enabled = false
  ip_allowlist_enabled        = false

  sections = [
    {
      name = "Core Services"
      resources = [
        {
          resource_id   = mihari_monitor.api_health.id
          resource_type = "monitor"
          title         = "API"
          description   = "Main API endpoint"
        },
        {
          resource_id   = mihari_monitor.website_keyword.id
          resource_type = "monitor"
          title         = "Website"
          description   = "Public website"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      name = "Infrastructure"
      resources = [
        {
          resource_id   = mihari_monitor.tcp_database.id
          resource_type = "monitor"
          title         = "Database"
          description   = "PostgreSQL primary"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `company_name` (String) Company name displayed on the status page.
- `subdomain` (String) Subdomain for the status page URL.

### Optional

- `custom_domain` (String) Custom domain for the status page.
- `ip_allowlist` (List of String) List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges.
- `ip_allowlist_enabled` (Boolean) Enable IP allowlist restriction.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for protected status pages (write-only).
- `password_protection_enabled` (Boolean) Enable password protection.
- `sections` (Attributes List) Status page sections (1-50). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID of the status page.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--sections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections`

Required:

- `name` (String) Section name.
- `resources` (Attributes List) Resources in this section (1-100). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--resources))

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) UUID of the section.

<a id="nestedatt--sections--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.resources`

Required:

- `resource_id` (String) UUID of the monitor or heartbeat.
- `resource_type` (String) Type: monitor, heartbeat, service, database, api.
- `title` (String) Display title.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Description of the resource.

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource section entry.
